title.en: Maintain and Enforce Network-Based URL Filters

prose.en: Enforce and update network-based URL filters to limit an enterprise asset from connecting to potentially malicious or unapproved websites. Example implementations include category-based filtering, reputation-based filtering, or through the use of block lists. Enforce filters for all enterprise assets.
Network-based URL filters are enforced and updated to limit an enterprise asset from connecting to potentially malicious or unapproved websites.
Filters are enforced for all enterprise assets.

example.en: Example implementations include category-based filtering, reputation-based filtering, or through the use of block lists.
